message:
feat(search): LRU embedding cache in progressive search and ProgressiveSearchRequest API

Adds TUI latency telemetry (PendingTuiLatencySample) for measuring
search-as-you-type responsiveness, and preserves the fix that allows
new searches to supersede in-flight searches via generation counter
(removing the search_in_flight gate that blocked the user from
searching while the initial empty-query search was running).

Also includes e2e TUI smoke test updates from concurrent agent work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
